raw:
- The point here is to be a banking app for smart people.
- I want full stripe integration
- I want interest reports and projections on credit lines
- Configurable graphs and charts
- stock portfolio tracking
- Crypto tracking and wallet management
- wallet management
- Privacy.com integrations to create and track temporary limited cards
- Automated insurance appraisal. I want to integrate an SMTP server that can send emails to insurance brokers inquiring about prices. Then theyll report the reponses, and Ill get the best price.
- The same should go for all bills like phone bill, internet, gas, electricity, entertainment, rent, whatever.
- proactive problem solving. Can be configured to use an llm to analyze the situation and reccomend a pathway forward
optimized:
### OPT-001: Core Identity — Smart Banking Dashboard
Build a personal finance management application targeting financially literate users. Emphasis on data density, configurability, and automation over hand-holding. All modules below are top-level features of this single application.

Source: "The point here is to be a banking app for smart people."

---

### OPT-002: Stripe Integration
Implement full Stripe API integration — account linking, transaction ingestion, payment processing, balance tracking. Support both personal and business Stripe accounts.

Source: "I want full stripe integration"

---

### OPT-003: Credit Line Interest Reports and Projections
Build interest reporting for active credit lines: current accrued interest, APR breakdowns, minimum payment impact modeling, payoff projections with configurable scenarios (pay X/month, lump sum, etc.). Render as both tabular data and charts.

Source: "I want interest reports and projections on credit lines"

---

### OPT-004: Configurable Graphs and Charts
Implement a chart/graph engine with user-configurable parameters: date ranges, account filters, metric selection, chart type (line, bar, pie, area), comparison overlays. Charts must be reusable across all modules (credit lines, portfolios, spending, bills).

Source: "Configurable graphs and charts"

---

### OPT-005: Stock Portfolio Tracking
Integrate market data API for stock portfolio tracking: holdings, cost basis, unrealized P&L, dividend tracking, sector allocation, historical performance charts. Support manual position entry and brokerage account linking.

Source: "stock portfolio tracking"

---

### OPT-006: Crypto Tracking and Wallet Management
Implement cryptocurrency portfolio tracking with wallet management: connect wallets (read-only), track balances across chains, transaction history, cost basis, unrealized P&L. Support major chains (ETH, BTC, SOL at minimum). Unified view across all connected wallets.

Source: "Crypto tracking and wallet management" + "wallet management" (merged)

---

### OPT-007: Privacy.com Virtual Card Integration
Integrate Privacy.com API: create single-use and merchant-locked virtual cards, set spending limits, pause/close cards, track spend per card. Surface transaction data in the main dashboard alongside other accounts.

Source: "Privacy.com integrations to create and track temporary limited cards"

---

### OPT-008: Automated Bill Negotiation via SMTP
Build an automated outreach system for bill negotiation. Integrate an SMTP server (send) and IMAP/POP3 (receive). System generates and sends inquiry emails to providers/brokers requesting competitive quotes. Parse responses, extract pricing, rank by cost, present comparison to user. Cover all recurring bill categories: insurance, phone, internet, gas, electricity, entertainment, rent, and user-defined categories. User approves before any email is sent.

Source: "Automated insurance appraisal..." + "The same should go for all bills..." (merged)

---

### OPT-009: LLM-Powered Proactive Financial Analysis
Implement a configurable LLM analysis layer that monitors financial data across all modules. Detects anomalies, identifies savings opportunities, flags risks (unusual charges, rate increases, underperforming assets), and recommends actionable next steps. User configures which modules the LLM monitors and how aggressively it intervenes (notification only vs. draft actions). LLM provider must be configurable (support multiple backends).

Source: "proactive problem solving. Can be configured to use an LLM to analyze the situation and recommend a pathway forward"

---

Summary: 9 optimized instructions from 11 raw items (2 merged). Zero items discarded. All user intent preserved.
